result.stdout_text:
cat: Read text from one or more files, or splice piped stdin with `-`.
Usage: cat [path ...|-]

Reads rooted text files or piped text. Use `-` to splice piped stdin into the file list. For directories use ls. For binary content use stat.
Examples:
  cat /notes/todo.txt
  cat /notes/a.txt /notes/b.txt
  grep ERROR /logs/app.log | cat
  grep ERROR /logs/app.log | cat /notes/header.txt -
